items.title: Lectric Memorial Day Sale offers up to $694 in FREE gear + up to $500 price cuts on e-bikes starting from $799
items.summary:
Lectric has just launched its Memorial Day e-bike Sale, one of the brand’s biggest sale events of the year, not to mention of summer, and you’re able to score up to $720 total savings: up to $694 in FREE bundled gear alongside two models getting up to $500 price drops. Many of the brand’s popular e-bikes are getting increased bundle packages during this event, like my personal pick for all-around commuting versatility, the XP4 750 Folding Utility e-bike that comes with $473 in FREE gear at $1,299 shipped, while the standard XP4 e-bike is getting a FREE $227 bundle at $999 shipped. Without the savings on the bundles, these packages would normally run you $1,772 and $1,226, respectively. The standard XP4 bundles contain the usual LevelUp rack, suspension seat post, and accordion bike lock, while the XP4 750 e-bike gets those alongside an Elite headlight, a phone mount, a pair of mirrors, and a water-resistant pannier bag. Head below to learn more (or check out our hands-on review here) and browse the full lineup of Memorial Day deals.

more…

Already down from $2,799 and $3,499 price tags, you’ll currently find both options as low as $1,619 (at Amazon for the standalone station) and $2,399 (direct from Jackery for bundle) elsewhere, with these prices only beaten by the former exclusive deals we secured for them back during New Years. Today’s deals gives you $1,350 and $1,400 markdowns, landing them at the second-lowest prices we have tracked.

This new model hit the market back in March at a $2,299 full price, which recently got a chop down to a $1,199 MSRP to better align with market values, though it has been seen climbing up as high as $1,449 at Amazon. Previously, we’ve been seeing this station discounted to $1,199 since the initial launch deal that landed it at $1,099 (which dropped to today’s price with our code). That all-time low is coming back around during this sale, with our exclusive code giving you combined total savings of $188 off the new going rate ($438 off Amazon’s highest recent pricing) for the best price we have tracked. I actually own a couple of Tribit speakers, and one of them is the original StormBox Micro. It’s still rocking and rolling several years later and what I love most about it is the strap around back that makes it easy to latch onto handlebars and the like when out and about. The same is true with the 3rd generation model here, but with upgraded internals like Bluetooth 6 and more.
